section.heading: Long-distance telephone calls for Vice President

content.p: Commencing January 20, 1949, the provisions of existing law relating to long-distance telephone calls for Senators shall be equally applicable to the Vice President of the United States.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 46d–1 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
